goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'north'.
Make sure you get 'price range', 'hotel type', and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should 'leave after 11:30'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'broxbourne'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the north
Make sure you get price range, hotel type, and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should leave after 11:30
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from broxbourne
Make sure you get travel time
